title: ilex baasiana
intro: Ilex baasiana, also known as Chinese Holly or Baas's Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. The plant is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex baasiana include improving cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, Ilex baasiana is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
